builders.name: Andrej <g id="76457">Karpathy</g>
builders.bio: 我喜欢训练大型深度神经网络。曾任AI @ Tesla总监，创始团队@ OpenAI ，博士@ Stanford。

tweets.text: 起草了一篇博客文章，使用LLM在4个小时内改进了论点，然后要求它提出相反的论点，并推翻了整个论点。LLM在论证几乎任何方向方面都非常有能力，这对于形成意见非常有用。
tweets.text_en: Drafted a blog post, used an LLM to improve the argument over 4 hours, then asked it to argue the opposite and it demolished the entire argument. LLMs are extremely competent in arguing almost any direction - useful for forming opinions.

builders.bio_en: I like to train large deep neural nets. Previously Director of AI @ Tesla, founding team @ OpenAI, PhD @ Stanford.

tweets.text: 虚假等同是一个陷阱--小心地押注于一小部分事情。不要对冲。设置触发器以监控是否出错。如果更正确，则提前加倍测试。
tweets.text_en: False equivalence is a trap - carefully bet on a very small set of things. Don't hedge. Set triggers to monitor if wrong. Tests to double down early if more right.

tweets.text: 在双子座上看到了巨大的吸收-这个周末试试吧！
tweets.text_en: Seeing great uptake on Gemini - give it a try this weekend!
